name: parabun-browser-shims
description: Browser-compatible shims for the few specifiers Parabun's parse-time desugarings emit that don't yet have @para/* packages: bun:wrap (the wrap-macro runtime), parabun:gpu (CPU + WebGPU backend), parabun:llm (throw-stub). The cross-runtime Lib modules (signals/parallel/simd/arena/etc.) have moved to individual @para/* npm packages — install those directly. This package is slated for removal in 0.4.x once the remaining shims migrate or get retired.
